role: People Analytics & Operations, University Hire (Rotational Program)

key_points.one_liner: P1 entry/new-grad framing. HONEST fit: People-analytics strength is real (2,000+ survey analysis -> C-suite, $362K leave-cost audit, 25+-sta
key_points.our_fit_analysis: P1 entry/new-grad framing. HONEST fit: People-analytics strength is real (2,000+ survey analysis -> C-suite, $362K leave-cost audit, 25+-stakeholder needs assessments) and maps to 'tell the story in data' + 'run the HR ops engine' + Notion-power-user + AI-fluency. GAP disclosed: core ask 'SQL is your native language' + Snowflake/Python — Jamie's analytics is Excel/Google Sheets/SPSS, NOT SQL. Cover discloses SQL as the growth edge truthfully; resume makes NO SQL claim. Program explicitly bets on 'how fast you learn' and says apply even if you don't meet every bullet.
key_points.source_note: no full JD captured; key points composed from our record fields (jd_source=none).
